education.title: High School

projects.title: MedTrack — Healthcare Portal
projects.desc: Full-stack appointment and records management platform serving 12,000+ patients with real-time availability and HIPAA-compliant secure data handling.
projects.challenge: Building a reliable real-time slot booking engine that could handle concurrent appointment requests without double-booking.
projects.solution: Implemented optimistic locking with Redis-backed sessions and WebSocket notifications for instant confirmation.

projects.title: LuxeCart — E-Commerce Platform
projects.desc: High-conversion online store with AI-driven product recommendations, Stripe integration, and real-time inventory sync across 3 warehouses.
projects.challenge: Reducing cart abandonment and improving checkout conversion across mobile devices.
projects.solution: One-click checkout flow, smart recommendation engine using purchase history, and progressive web app capabilities.

projects.title: DataPulse — Analytics Dashboard
projects.desc: Interactive BI tool with live data pipelines, custom D3 charts, role-based access control, and automated reporting for enterprise teams.
projects.challenge: Rendering 100k+ data points interactively without degrading browser performance.
projects.solution: Canvas-based rendering with WebWorker data processing and virtual scrolling for large datasets.

projects.title: ConnectHub — Real-Time Messaging
projects.desc: Scalable chat application supporting 10,000+ concurrent users with end-to-end encryption, file sharing, and WebRTC video calls.
projects.challenge: Maintaining message ordering and delivery guarantees at scale across distributed server instances.
projects.solution: Redis pub/sub for cross-instance messaging with a Kafka-backed event log for guaranteed delivery and replay.

projects.title: EduFlow — LMS Platform
projects.desc: Adaptive learning management system with AI-powered personalised learning paths. Deployed across 3 institutions in Uttar Pradesh.
projects.challenge: Creating personalisation that works for learners with wildly different backgrounds and learning speeds.
projects.solution: Collaborative filtering model trained on 50k student interactions, feeding a dynamic content sequencing engine.

projects.title: PropFinder — Real Estate App
projects.desc: Property discovery platform with geospatial search, 3D virtual tour integration, and ML-powered valuation models for buyers and agents.
projects.challenge: Geospatial queries on a 200k+ property dataset needed to return in under 500ms with polygon-based filtering.
projects.solution: PostGIS spatial indexing with server-side clustering and aggressive CDN caching of tile layers.
